\n\n“Oh, umm, may I ask what you need, [pc.name]?” she says with a familiar blush on her face.

\n\nAina breathes a sigh of relief. “I guess I shouldn’t have jumped to conclusions.”
\n\nYou proceed to tell her about Amber’s condition and how you’re trying to develop a cure for it.

\n\n“Oh, that sounds horrible!” she says, mortified, covering her mouth with both hands. “My estrus lasts only five days and I already don’t know what to do with myself; I can’t even imagine what it would be like to be like that permanently!”

\n\nYou [pc.isBimbo|giggle dismissively.|nod, though you can’t help the hint of a smug smirk on your lips.] “It’s not so bad, "+(1===flags.AMBER_CREW_SEX&&crew(!0)>1?"me and my crew have":"I’ve")+" been taking care of it.”

\n\nA blank stare, then Aina blushes once again as your meaning dawns on her. "+(1===flags.AMBER_CREW_SEX&&crew(!0)>1?"“You... and your crew? Her problem must be even more serious than I thought.”":"“I see you like helping girls with... highly specific needs stemming from their heat cycle.”")

\n\nYou find yourself laughing out loud at her choice of words, and a confused Aina blinks vacantly as you hold your belly. When you finally catch your breath, you explain that the sex is actually not the problem – what’s making Amber unhappy is the fact that there isn’t much space left in her head for things that are not sex. As a result, she has a lot of trouble focusing and can’t really find the time to enjoy her life in any other way.

\n\nThe honey-blonde centauress closes her eyes and shakes her head. “Not being able to live one’s own life... That sounds like too high a price to pay, even if the sex is supposed to be amazing,” she says sympathetically. “Tell me, [pc.name], how can I help her?”
\n\nYou give her a [pc.isNice|sweet|sincere] smile. “Thanks, Aina. I’m glad I came to you for help.”
\n\nShe averts her gaze, fidgeting with her fingers. “Well, you helped me when I needed it, so it’s only fair that I help you in return. What, umm, what do I need to do?”

\n\n“Oh, it’s nothing much, I just need a small sample of your genes.” She blinks in surprise, and you explain that you’re working with researchers to develop a treatment that will normalize Amber’s heat cycle.
\n\nAs someone pursuing a career in the sciences, even if her field is different,
\n\n
Aina listens with an active interest. “Do I need to go to a laboratory, or...”

\n\n“That won’t be needed,” you say with a grin. Using the gene extraction kit given by Lumi, you easily collect a blood sample from the centauress. Having a stable estrus cycle, no doubt her genes will be a huge contribution to curing Amber. “There, all done!”

\n\n“What, already? Where did you get such high quality tools? I didn’t even feel the pinprick!” she says with a bit of surprise, gazing at the blood vial in your hand as you store it in hermetical safety.
\n\n“I have friends in the right places,” you explain simply.
\n\nShe chuckles. “You’ve got to introduce me some time!”

\n\nStanding in the hall is a chestnut-colored centauress, wearing a worried look on her face. As soon as she spots you, her tawny eyes light up and she canters over, her hooves clip-clopping against the hard thoroughfare surface.

\n\n“H-hi! Sorry, I’m kind of approaching you out of nowhere, even though you’re a stranger... but, uh, I’ve got a problem only a stranger can fix. Can you help me out?” she asks, clasping her pale hands against her chest.

\n\nShe’s definitely not a Leithan; modded, perhaps? Her human half is covered in a champagne-colored sweater and a cream linen skirt, the hem falling down to her horse-like knees. It utterly fails to cover up her tauric body, though, or her bristly horse tail. Her honey-blonde hair is tied back in a far less literal ponytail, secured with a lace ribbon.

Quickly joining Alex at the bar and taking your seat, you pick the best option to get his attention; you pat the bar and then get ready to wave to him. The only problem is that he practically jumps out of his skin and slams his tablet against the countertop instead of just look your way like someone normally might.
\n\n“O-Oh! Hey [pc.name]! I uh... what’s up,” his hand hesitantly reaches out as if to shake with you. “I uh... er...”
\n\nHe doesn’t give you any time to grab his hand despite offering it; he tucks it back down into his pockets and flushes red for a moment.

\n\n“Sorry. I just don’t really know how to talk with you. I left you that note and... it didn’t really occur to me until later exactly who you are. Can’t believe I spent the night with someone so famous and we didn’t even do anything.”
No Big Deal
Play It Up
Not quite sitting down, you sneak your way over right behind Alex... then pat his back just hard enough to get a jump out of him.
\n\nAnd boy does he jump; the dark-skinned dude’s eyes shoot wide and he half-leaps out of his chair before looking back at you with a mix of alarm and something... sensual?
\n\n“O-Oh,” Alex sighs in relief and immediately sits down. “You scared the hell out of me! Urgh. We sure drank a lot last time... but I didn’t mind it much.”
\n\nHis lips curl into a small grin; and then his hand carefully beckons you right back to your seat from last time.
\n\n“Come on... what are you so scared of?”
Sounds Good
Maybe Later
Making your way over to the bar-bound man once more, his attention turns from his drink to you.
\n\n“Oh, uh, hey,” he blurts while hastily putting on his best smile. “What’s going on?”
Apologize
Never Mind

It doesn’t take more than a few seconds of approaching before the dark-skinned prettyboy spots you. It takes only an instant for him to start circling his fingertip across the cushion beside him with a hopeful grin trying to melt into you.
\n\n“So you’re back; think we can finally have that drink?”
Sounds Good
Maybe Later

Taking your spot next to Alex and tapping the counter to get his attention is enough to get a small jump out of the [maleherm|npc|m] but not enough to get him spooked like the very first time. Alex looks at you with a scowl for a moment though as if he’s trying to choose between getting angry or being happy you dropped by to give him something to do for the day.

\n\n“Alright Steele, alright,” his hand thumps the tablet down and over before leaning in and smirking at you. “What’s going on with my "+(void 0!==flags.FUCKED_ALEX?"favorite fuck":"drinking ")+"buddy? Looking to have some fun, I bet!”

\n\nYour attention is drawn by a tall and very pretty... Man? Woman? A very pretty person leaning against the bar, clad in baggy pants tucked into boots and a strip of cloth wrapped tightly around their very flat chest. That combined with the close-cropped hair and slight but noticeable muscle tone makes you want to say it’s a man, but their lithe, narrow waist and flared hips imply otherwise. Before you can make a call, the person in question flashes you a brilliant smile your way and beckons you over.
Pretty Boy
\n\nIt looks like that androgynous man from before is around again.
Pretty Boy

buddy Alex is hanging out in his usual spot at the bar, drinking something fruity looking and casting occasional lascivious glances your way.
